code_issues.issue: CheckOrigin returns true for all origins allowing any website to connect
code_issues.fix: Implement proper origin validation based on allowed origins list

code_issues.issue: No JWT validation - falls back to random user ID generation when auth header missing
code_issues.fix: Require valid JWT token, reject connections without proper authentication

code_issues.issue: Context key definitions duplicate internal/auth/jwt/tenant_claims.go with different type values
code_issues.fix: Consolidate context keys into single shared package to prevent context propagation failures

code_issues.issue: ListByOrganization query selects u.email, u.name but scans to OrganizationUser struct without these fields
code_issues.fix: Add Email and Name fields to OrganizationUser struct or remove from SELECT

code_issues.issue: Platform admin early return causes role mapping to be skipped
code_issues.fix: Move role mapping before early return or handle platform admin role assignment properly

code_issues.issue: RLS policy references tenant_id column but Organization struct has no TenantID field
code_issues.fix: Add TenantID field to Organization struct and database schema

code_issues.issue: Create method has no input validation for required fields like name and slug
code_issues.fix: Add validation for name required, slug format before INSERT

code_issues.issue: Uses fmt.Sprintf to build SQL with table names - SQL injection risk
code_issues.fix: Use a whitelist of valid table names or proper query builder
Add validation: MaxPrinters, MaxStorageGB, MaxJobsPerMonth, MaxUsers must be >= 0

code_issues.issue: Hardcoded HTTP status code 500 instead of using apperrors constants
code_issues.fix: Use apperrors.WithHTTPStatus or predefined status constants
Add audit log entry for ownership transfer events

missing_items: Database migration files for organizations table with tenant_id column
Database migration files for quota_configs and quota_usage tables
API handlers for organization CRUD operations
blocking_issues: No JWT validation on WebSocket connections allows unauthorized access
Context key inconsistency breaks tenant context propagation between packages
SQL scan mismatch will cause runtime panic in ListByOrganization
RLS policies reference non-existent tenant_id column
fix_instructions:
1. Fix WebSocket authentication: Require valid JWT, validate origin, extract org_id from token claims
2. Consolidate context keys: Create internal/shared/context/keys.go with single source of truth
3. Fix scan mismatch: Add Email/Name fields to OrganizationUser or create separate DTO
4. Add TenantID field to Organization struct and create migration
5. Add input validation to Create method and UpdateConfig
6. Fix middleware platform admin role handling
7. Replace fmt.Sprintf SQL building with safe alternatives
8. Add proper HTTP status codes using apperrors package
9. Create database migrations for all new tables
10. Add integration tests for multi-tenant isolation
